title: Apply insurance industry knowledge to vehicle loss assessments
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply insurance industry knowledge to vehicle loss assessments demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of the insurance industry

pcs.text: Sources of information on the structure and functions of the insurance industry are identified and accessed according to workplace policies and procedures1.2 Broad structures of the insurance industry and their relationship with each other are identified and appropriately applied to day-to-day work1.3 Insurance industry terminology and vocabulary are used in the correct context1.4 Trends and technology in the insurance industry are monitored on an ongoing basis to inform personal work practices1.5 Insurance organisation-specific policies, procedures and processes are identified, clarified where necessary, and applied
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sources of information on the structure and functions of the insurance industry are identified and accessed according to workplace policies and procedures1.2 Broad structures of the insurance industry and their relationship with each other are identified and appropriately applied to day-to-day work1.3 Insurance industry terminology and vocabulary are used in the correct context1.4 Trends and technology in the insurance industry are monitored on an ongoing basis to inform personal work practices1.5 Insurance organisation-specific policies, procedures and processes are identified, clarified where necessary, and applied?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sources of information on the structure and functions of the insurance industry are identified and accessed according to workplace policies and procedures1.2 Broad structures of the insurance industry and their relationship with each other are identified and appropriately applied to day-to-day work1.3 Insurance industry terminology and vocabulary are used in the correct context1.4 Trends and technology in the insurance industry are monitored on an ongoing basis to inform personal work practices1.5 Insurance organisation-specific policies, procedures and processes are identified, clarified where necessary, and applied.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Develop and apply an understanding of the insurance industry

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of government Acts and regulations relevant to the insurance industry

pcs.text: Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements of a loss assessor are interpreted and complied with2.2 Reporting requirements and procedures are identified2.3 Requirements under privacy law are identified, clarified where necessary, and complied with
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements of a loss assessor are interpreted and complied with2.2 Reporting requirements and procedures are identified2.3 Requirements under privacy law are identified, clarified where necessary, and complied with?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements of a loss assessor are interpreted and complied with2.2 Reporting requirements and procedures are identified2.3 Requirements under privacy law are identified, clarified where necessary, and complied with.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop and apply an understanding of government Acts and regulations relevant to the insurance industry

elements.title: Develop and apply an understanding of loss assessment processes

pcs.text: Knowledge of loss assessment processes, procedures and policy is interpreted3.2 Condition of vehicle compared to incident description is analysed to determine incident-related damage3.3 Conflict resolution principles are applied3.4 Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements, and their relationship to identified vehicle damage are interpreted, clarified where necessary, and applied3.5 Automotive industry technical knowledge and experience are applied to determine accuracy of vehicle damage estimate to return the vehicle to pre-damage condition that conforms to manufacturer guidelines and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Knowledge of loss assessment processes, procedures and policy is interpreted3.2 Condition of vehicle compared to incident description is analysed to determine incident-related damage3.3 Conflict resolution principles are applied3.4 Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements, and their relationship to identified vehicle damage are interpreted, clarified where necessary, and applied3.5 Automotive industry technical knowledge and experience are applied to determine accuracy of vehicle damage estimate to return the vehicle to pre-damage condition that conforms to manufacturer guidelines and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Knowledge of loss assessment processes, procedures and policy is interpreted3.2 Condition of vehicle compared to incident description is analysed to determine incident-related damage3.3 Conflict resolution principles are applied3.4 Statutory insurance industry principles, obligations and compliance requirements, and their relationship to identified vehicle damage are interpreted, clarified where necessary, and applied3.5 Automotive industry technical knowledge and experience are applied to determine accuracy of vehicle damage estimate to return the vehicle to pre-damage condition that conforms to manufacturer guidelines and industry standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop and apply an understanding of loss assessment processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
